name: Musnad Ahmad
author: Imam Ahmad ibn Hanbal
description: Musnad Ahmad is one of the most famous and important collections of hadith, compiled by Imam Ahmad ibn Hanbal (d. 241 AH/855 AD). It is the largest of the main books of hadith containing approximately 28,199 hadith, organized by the companion who narrated them. Currently 1,359 hadiths are available with English translation.

books.name: Musnad of Abu Muhammad Talhah bin 'Ubaidullah
The Musnad of az-Zubair bin al-'Awwam
